headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' unpkg.com cdn.jsdelivr.net cdnjs.cloudflare.com cdn.sheetjs.com js.sentry-cdn.com browser.sentry-cdn.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' fonts.googleapis.com; font-src fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: blob: *.supabase.co; connect-src 'self' *.supabase.co wss://*.supabase.co *.sentry.io; frame-src 'none'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'
